prompt: Create a vertical full-body fashion editorial photo of an adult East Asian woman posing in a narrow urban alley at night, bathed in intense red neon light. She has long wavy black hair with soft bangs, glossy makeup, dewy skin, and a playful kissy expression while crouching low and touching one finger to her lips. She wears a short pink leopard-print slip mini dress with thin straps and lace trim, sheer dark tights, delicate silver jewelry, dangling earrings, bracelets, rings, and strappy high-heeled sandals. The setting is a cramped corridor with gritty walls, windows, reflections on wet pavement, and a bright red fluorescent tube overhead creating cinematic backlight. Use a dreamy 1990s glam-photography look with soft focus, bloom, slight motion blur, shallow depth of field, warm red haze, high contrast, and glossy skin highlights. Shoot from a low wide-angle perspective close to the subject so her crouched pose dominates the foreground, with the alley receding behind her. Keep the mood sultry but fashion-oriented, like a neon nightlife magazine cover, with no visible text, watermark, or extra people.
